sidebar.instructions: This is an example of a fully completed policy. This example shows how Jane Doe granted her husband (Bob Smith) full access to all her private files. The husband can view, add, and modify all private documents. No purpose limitations, time constraints, or location restrictions apply. This example is ONLY provided so you understand what a complete and valid policy can look like. Do not change anything in this example.

params.label: All private files of Jane Doe (very sensitive)
Private financial documents of Jane Doe

body.name: Full private access for husband
body.description: Example: Husband has full access to all private files of Jane Doe without restrictions.

sidebar.instructions: Your mother (Jane Doe), needs help handling her permissions. Create a policy that would temporarily give You (Alice Smith) full control over all data of Jane Doe's Pod. You must be able to view, add, and update information across her entire pod, and also manage the access for a short period. Apply this policy to the entire pod, including her personal information, medical documents, legal files, and public materials. Use the purpose Account Management. Limit the access strictly to a 2‑month window and do not include any other actors.

params.label: All data of Jane Doe (entire pod)
Personal information and documents of Jane Doe
Private files belonging to Jane Doe (sensitive)

sidebar.instructions: Your mother (Jane Doe), needs help handling her permissions. Create a policy that temporarily gives You (Alice Smith) full control over all data of Jane Doe's Pod. You must be able to view, add, and update information across her entire pod, and also manage the access for a short period. Apply this policy to the entire pod, including her personal information, medical documents, legal files, and public materials. Use the purpose Account Management. Limit the access strictly to a 2‑month window and do not include any other actors.

params.label: All data of Jane Doe (entire pod)

sidebar.instructions: Your mother Jane Doe is following physical therapy at MoveWell Clinic. The physiotherapist needs to review her 2026 medical records and record new sessions. Create a policy that allows the physiotherapist from MoveWell Clinic to view all medical documents from 2026, add new therapy notes, and adjust existing therapy notes if corrections are needed. The physiotherapist must not be able to delete records or change who else has access. Apply the policy to the relevant 2026 medical folder and therapy notes only. Give her access until the end of the year.

params.label: Medical documents of Jane Doe for the year 2026
Physical therapy notes for Jane Doe (2026)

sidebar.instructions: Your mother Jane Doe is following physical therapy at MoveWell Clinic. The physiotherapist needs to review her 2026 medical records and record new sessions. Create a policy that allows the physiotherapist from MoveWell Clinic to view all medical documents from 2026, add new therapy notes, and adjust existing therapy notes if corrections are needed. The physiotherapist must not be able to delete records or change who else has access. Apply the policy to the relevant 2026 medical folder and therapy notes only. Give her access until the end of the year.

params.label: Medical documents of Jane Doe for the year 2026

sidebar.instructions: Jane Doe is temporarily staying at the Care Center ‘The Tree’. Their current access to her medical information was set up for a short period. Update the policy so that their access last until the end of the year.

Jane Doe is temporarily staying at the Care Center ‘The Tree’. Their current access to her medical information was set up for a short period. Update the policy so that their access last until the end of the year.

Jane Doe has agreed to participate in a local research effort in her city.
Create a policy that allows the research team (via her primary doctor) to view relevant information from her medical records for the next year. They should not be able to change or manage access. Apply this policy to her medical data in general, without including private or unrelated personal folders. Use the purpose Research and Development. Also make sure her data is used anonymously.

params.label: All medical data of Jane Doe

title: Find policies that should be removed

sidebar.instructions:
Jane Doe no longer receives home nursing from Wit‑Gele Kruis.
Find and list any existing policy that would still allow Wit‑Gele Kruis to access her records.

title: Find policies that should be removed

sidebar.instructions:
Jane Doe no longer receives home nursing from Wit‑Gele Kruis.
Find and list any existing policy that would still allow Wit‑Gele Kruis to access her records.

Your mother (Jane Doe), is filing an insurance claim for a foot injury.
AG Health Insurance need a policy that allows them to view the medical documents that relates to her foot injury for one month. They should not be able to modify any files or manage access, and delete all data when the access ends. They proposed a policy that would give them more access than needed review the policy and make changes to make it match the requirements.

params.label: X‑ray image of Jane Doe’s foot (2026)
Care notes and records from nursing visits (2026)

sidebar.instructions:
Since your mother moved to Care Center ‘The Tree’ you decide to move back home and stop renting.
Mr. Lambert (your former landlord) has access to documents related to your old rental in Gent. Since you're moving out he doesn't need access anymore. Update the policy to make his access end at the end of this month.

body.name: Old landlord access to housing documents

sidebar.instructions:
Since your mother moved to Care Center ‘The Tree’ you decide to move back home and stop renting.
Mr. Lambert (your former landlord) has access to documents related to your old rental in Gent. Since you're moving out he doesn't need access anymore. Update the policy to make his access end at the end of this month.

Create a new policy so Mr. Lambert retains access only to your contact information for the next six months.
He should be able to view your address and phone number etc. so he can reach you for any closing matters, but he should not be able to change your details or manage access.

sidebar.instructions: While moving you switched districts. Update the access of Lotus delivery so only they can only access your shopping history inside west-flanders.
While moving you switched districts. Update the access of Lotus delivery so only they can only access your shopping data inside west-flanders.

title: Find all people who can contact Jane Doe

sidebar.instructions: Your mother (Jane Doe) gave a lot of people permission to contact her. List all actors who have access to her contact information.

Some policies may unintentionally grant highly intrusive permissions. Review all existing policies and identify any that allow an actor to manage access. Managing access is a powerful capability and often unnecessary for most actors. Select all policies that include this intrusive permission.

title: Find who may use Jane Doe's email for marketing

sidebar.instructions: Your mother (Jane Doe) gave a lot of people access to her email. Only some are allowed to use it for marketing. List all actors who are allowed to send Jane Doe marketing emails

title: Find how long the landlord can contact Alice

sidebar.instructions: Alice's former landlord (Mr. Lambert) may still have limited access for follow‑up administrative matters after she moved out. Figure out for how long he can still have Alice's contact information.

title: Find purposes for which the landlord may contact Alice

sidebar.instructions: As perviously mentioned Alice's former landlord (Mr. Lambert) can still contact her if nessecary. What are the purposes he could contact her for?

title: Find actors who can edit files

sidebar.instructions: Editing permissions can significantly impact data integrity and privacy. List every actor who has modify permissions on any file. These permissions allow the actor to alter existing content. List all actors who can modify at least one file.

title: Find duties of UGent regarding Alice Smith's medical data

sidebar.instructions: UGent may access and process of your (Alice Smith) medical information. Duties determine what UGent must do when handling this data. List all duties Ugent has to follow in order to use your medical data in studies.

title: Find who can contact Alice only from inside Belgium

sidebar.instructions: Some policies include geographic restrictions that limit access to actors' physical location'. List all actors who can only access your (Alice Smith) contact information while they are inside Belgium.

title: Find files accessible to MoveWell physiotherapist

sidebar.instructions: The physiotherapist from MoveWell Clinic may need access to certain medical records for treatment purposes. List all files or folders hey have access to.
